commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The replacement PR adds a `watch-targets` skills snapshot invalidation when `ensureSkillsWatcher` rebuilds for a changed root set, reads the snapshot version after watcher setup, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main rebuilds the skills watcher on changed root targets without bumping the snapshot version, and the session path reads the version before watcher setup; I did not run a live Gateway mount reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this automerge-opted replacement PR already contains the narrow fix, tests, and sufficient proof, so remaining action is normal CI and merge gating.

Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83800 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
